title: Beneath the Bedrock
description: [Horror] Strange things are happening in your world... You must venture beneath the bedrock and uncover the secrets of the void
body:
This mod adds strange entities and dimensions below the bedrock floor of the Overworld.
But beware, as not everything is as calm as it may seem...
And perhaps the entire world works different to how you think it does.

The mod is quite slow-burn, so sometimes you have to wait some time for something to happen.
Also, in the new dimensions, exploration is key.
WARNING: the gallery contains minor spoilers! it is recommended to go in blind for the best experience.

### This mod has no dependencies :>
It is recommended to play using some sort of Programmer Art, but it is not 100% required and the desired playstyle is up to you, the ~~simulation~~ player.

The mod should not interfere with other mods.

[The mod is still in beta and as such the lore and some dimensions are W.I.P.]
